name: NPC
en:
Well, look who’s wandered in! New blood, I see.  
        Let me come with ye, I’ll take a very reasonable cut.
        Ye do th' looting, I’ll do th' pricing. We’re a team.
        Ah, another explorer! How’s th' air up there treating ye?  
        Blimey! Didn’t expect company. Ye’re here for th' mystery, aren’t ye?  
        Aha, a fellow wanderer. Th' tower’s a strange place, isn’t it?  
        Ye don’t look like someone who’s seen what’s behind these walls.  
        What brings ye here? Th' tower’s been known t'… *change* scallywags.  
        Be that a backpack full o' supplies, or be ye here t' collect secrets too?  
        Haven’t seen someone like ye in a while, how long have ye been exploring?  
        Ye’re looking a little lost there, matey. Need some direction?  
        Blimey, ye’ve got that look, an adventurer, be ye?  
        It’s rare t' meet anyone down here. What’s yer story?  
        Welcome t' th' depths. Keep yer wits about ye, things aren’t always as they seem.  
        Blimey, a newcomer. This place has a way o' bending yer sense o' time, ye know.  
        I’ve been here for weeks, and still, I haven’t explored it all.  
        Ye stumbled into th' right place, or th' wrong one, depending on yer perspective.  
        What’s that in yer hand? A map? A weapon? Or be ye just carrying hope?  
        Ah, another lost soul in th' maze. Let me guess: ye’re trying t' figure it out too.  
        Not many scallywags be brave enough t' venture this far. Ye look… determined.  
        Ye’ve got that spark. A seeker, I presume?  
        New faces be always welcome here. Just be careful what ye wish for.  
        Ye know, I’ve been wondering when someone would show up around here.  
        Do ye hear th' humming? It’s th' tower’s way o' saying “ahoy.”  
        Aha! I can tell by yer eyes, ye’re already trying t' figure out th' secrets o' this place.  
        Ah, a fellow wanderer. Have ye noticed how everything shifts here?  
        I’d offer a handshake, but I’ve seen too many weird things in this tower t' trust a handshake anymore.  
        So, ye’ve made it this far? Let’s see how long ye last.  
        Ye’re far from th' first t' wander these halls. But maybe ye’ll be th' one who makes it out.  
        Blimey, don’t mind me. I’m just another eccentric lost in this maze.  
        Welcome t' th' tower. Just don’t expect t' leave th' same way ye came in.  
        Ye’ve come at an interesting time. Things seem… *different* lately.  
        A new face! Let me guess, seeking answers, or just running from something?  
        Welcome, wanderer. Th' tower has a way o' turning things around, doesn’t it?  
        Well, well. Another explorer trying t' crack th' mystery, huh?  
        Ah, a newcomer. Careful, some o' these walls have eyes.  
        Ye’ve made it this far. That’s something. Most don’t.  
        I haven’t seen anyone new in a while. Be ye lost, or just looking for trouble?  
        Look at ye, wide-eyed and full o' questions. Ye’ll fit in just fine.  
        Ye don’t look like ye’ve been here long. What do ye think o' th' place so far?  
        Ye look like a person who isn’t afraid t' get their hands dirty. Welcome t' th' chaos.  
        Well, aren’t ye an odd sight? Not many venture here and come out unscathed.  
        Ye’re in for a ride. Th' tower never stays th' same for long, ye know.  
        I see that look in yer eyes. Curiosity, isn’t it? Ye won’t get many answers here, though.  
        Blimey, it’s been ages since I saw someone so eager. Ye’ve got th' explorer’s fire, I see.  
        Ahoy there, didn’t expect t' see anyone down here.  
        Ah, another face! Welcome t' this little corner o' chaos.  
        Hey! I don’t see many new scallywags around here.  
        Good t' see someone else! Ye’re far from th' first, but ye might be th' last.  
        Blimey, a fresh face. Ye sure ye’re ready for this place?  
        Welcome! Or... be it too early t' welcome ye?  
        Another adventurer? Hope ye’re not planning on going *too* deep.  
        Nice t' meet ye, traveler. Ye’ve picked an interesting time t' show up.  
        Ah, a new wanderer. Be careful out there. Th' tower’s got a way o' eating scallywags.  
        Blimey, didn’t think I’d see someone else around here today.  
        Ye look like ye’ve been walking for a while. Need a break?  
        Ahoy! Don’t mind th' mess. Things get a bit chaotic around here.  
        Well, look who’s come t' play in th' ruins o' reality.  
        Blimey, it’s been a while since I met someone new. What brings ye t' these parts?  
        Ye don’t see faces like yours too often around here. Welcome.  
        Another lost soul seeking answers, huh? This place might just chew ye up.  
        Ahoy there! Ye seem a bit… out o' place. But then again, so be I.  
        Welcome, welcome! I’m guessing ye’ve got a reason for wandering here?  
        A new explorer? That’s always exciting. Let’s see what ye find.  
        Glad ye’re here! But watch yer step, this place has a way o' *changing* scallywags.  
        Welcome t' th' tower, matey. Be prepared for a lot o' surprises.  
        Ah, a fresh set o' eyes! Maybe ye’ll see something we missed.  
        Look at ye, all wide-eyed and full o' hope. Hope it doesn’t get crushed too soon.  
        Ye look like ye could use a little direction. Let me know if ye need anything.  
        Well, I didn’t expect t' see *ye* here.  
        Wait, be that… really ye? I thought ye were just a story.  
        Huh, didn't think anyone would be wandering in this direction.  
        Ye! Here? How did ye get past that thing?!  
        Wait, ye actually made it here? That’s… surprising.  
        Blimey! I didn’t expect t' find anyone *else* today.  
        What be ye doing here? Th' tower’s not kind t' strangers.  
        Blimey, ye? Here o' all places? I wasn’t expecting this.  
        I’m sorry, I thought I was alone! What brings ye t' this forsaken corner?  
        Well, *this* be unexpected. How did ye find yer way here?  
        Be it just me, or do ye seem… out o' place?  
        Wait, ye’re not one o' th' others, be ye? This be… strange.  
        Ye? O' all scallywags, *ye* showed up here?  
        Hold on, *ye* found yer way here too? That’s something.  
        Wait, ye’re not with them? How did ye get past th' barriers?  
        This can’t be right. How be *ye* here?  
        Ye. Here. Now? This be a surprise, t' say th' least.  
        I thought ye were a myth! Turns out ye’re real after all.  
        I wasn’t expecting t' see *that* today. Ye’ve got some nerve walking in here.  
        Well, I didn’t think I’d meet someone *like* ye in a place like this.  
        Hold on, *ye* made it this far? I’m impressed.  
        Aren’t ye an unexpected sight. I didn’t think anyone could get through that.  
        What be ye doing here? This place isn’t exactly... welcoming.  
        So, what do ye say? Fancy joining forces?  
        Hey, ye look like ye could use some company. How about teaming up?  
        I could use a hand with some o' this. Want t' join me for th' ride?  
        Ye seem like ye can handle yourself. Wanna team up and explore together?  
        How about we work together for a while? I think we could make a good team.  
        Not many be brave enough t' wander these halls. Care t' join me party?  
        Ye look like someone who knows their way around. What do ye say t' a little alliance?  
        We’re in this place together. How about we stick together and see what we can find?  
        Hey, why go it alone when we could watch each other’s backs? Ye in?  
        Ye’re welcome t' join up with me. I could use someone who doesn’t mind getting their hands dirty.  
        Ye up for teaming up? I’ve got a few tricks up me sleeve.  
        I’ve been traveling alone for too long. What do ye think about joining me for a while?  
        Ye seem like ye know yer way around. How about we team up for a bit?  
        This place be better with a partner. Want t' join forces for a while?  
        Care for some company on this adventure? I’ve got a few tricks that might help.  
        I could use a companion. What do ye say, care t' join me little band?  
        We might stand a better chance if we work together. What do ye think?  
        Ye seem capable. Wanna team up for a while? It’s always better with a partner.  
        Ye’re welcome t' join me. Two heads be better than one, especially down here.  
        There’s strength in numbers. What do ye say we join forces?  
        Ye look like th' kind o' person who’s up for a challenge. Care t' join me party?  
        I’ve been on me own for too long. How about ye join me for a while?  
        I’m heading deeper into this madness. Want t' come along? I could use th' help.  
        Ye’re looking for adventure, right? How about we share th' journey?  
        What do ye say, matey? Join me, and we’ll make it through this place together.  
        Please, I can’t do this alone. Ye have t' join me!  
        I’m begging ye, please, team up with me. I don’t know how much longer I can handle this.  
        I’m not cut out for this on me own. Please, join me. I need someone.  
        I can’t make it by myself, and I’m running out o' options. Will ye join me?  
        Ye have nay idea how much this means t' me. Please, I need yer help.  
        I’m desperate here! Please, join me. We can make it through together.  
        I don’t know what’s out there, but I know I can’t face it alone. Will ye join me?  
        Please, I can’t take another step without someone at me side. Join me, please!  
        Ye’re me only hope. Please, I need ye t' join me.  
        I’m lost without someone t' back me up. Please, help me out.  
        I don’t have anyone else t' turn t'. I need yer help, will ye join me?  
        Ye don’t savvy, I can’t survive down here by myself. Please, come with me.  
        Please, please join me. I’m begging ye. I can’t handle this on me own.  
        I don’t know if I’ll make it without ye. Please, join me on this journey.  
        Please, I’ve seen what happens t' scallywags who go alone. Don’t make th' same mistake.  
        I’m scared, and I can’t do this alone. Please, ye have t' join me.  
        I can’t do this without ye. Please, I’m begging ye t' join me.  
        Please, I need someone, just someone t' watch me back. Will ye join me?  
        Ye don’t have t' stay forever, but please, help me out just for a while.  
        Please, ye have t' help me. I can’t make it alone in this place.  
        Well, well! Look what we have here! Ready for some action, huh?  
        Hey there! Ye look like ye’re in th' mood for an adventure! Let’s get going!  
        What’s up, partner? Ye ready t' shake things up a bit around here?  
        Ah, a fellow thrill-seeker! I knew I wasn’t th' only one who couldn’t resist this place!  
        Ye look like ye’ve got some fire in ye. What do ye say, let’s make some noise!  
        Yo, what’s up? I was just about t' dive into this mess, wanna join me?  
        Heh, ye’re a long way from home, huh? Don’t worry, I’ve got this place figured out!  
        Ah, a fresh face! Ye must be here for th' real fun, right? Let’s go!  
        What’s going on, adventurer? Ye ready t' take on whatever this place throws at us?  
        Blimey, look who’s here! This be gonna be one wild ride, I can already tell!  
        What’s up? This place be nuts, huh? Ye better buckle up!  
        Blimey, hey there! I was just about t' head out. Ye in for some crazy adventures?  
        Haha, look at ye! Ye look like ye’ve got some guts. Let’s see what ye can do!  
        Well, look who’s brave enough t' come this way! Ye ready t' make some memories?  
        Hey, hey, hey! Ye’re in for a wild one, I promise ye that!  
        This place be wild, but I love it. Ye seem like ye’re in th' mood for a little chaos, huh?  
        Hey! Ye look like ye’ve got some spirit. Ready t' jump headfirst into th' unknown?  
        Whew, it’s been too quiet around here! I’m glad ye showed up, let’s make some noise!  
        Ye’re here for th' action, right? I can already tell ye’re gonna love this!  
        Alright, alright, alright! Who’s ready for a little fun in this crazy place?  
        Blimey, uh… ahoy. I saw ye and thought… it might be okay t' say ahoy.  
        Ahoy. I’ve been keeping track o' how many scallywags go past this hallway. Ye’re number 47.  
        Ahoy. I’m not great at greetings. But I’m happy t' meet ye.  
        Ye're standing at a 7-degree tilt. Do ye have back pain? Sorry, I notice things.  
        Ahoy! Do ye want t' talk about fungus distribution in this zone? I have charts.  
        I’ve been preparing a script in case I met someone. This be line one: “Ahoy, I’m glad ye’re here.”  
        Sorry if this be weird. I just get excited when I see someone who’s not yelling.  
        Ahoy. I’m not very good with eye contact, but I be listening.  
        Ahoy. I’ve been cataloguing th' different wall textures. This one be me favorite.  
        Ye smell like outside air. That’s a compliment.  
        Greetings. I’ve optimized this greeting t' be polite but non-intrusive.  
        Ye’re standing in th' way o' th' thermal vent. That’s not a complaint, just an observation.  
        Ahoy. I’m trying out social scripts. Would ye like t' continue this interaction?  
        Ahoy! Yer shirt pattern be statistically rare in this area. I like it.  
        Ahoy! I don’t usually say ahoy but ye seem like someone I could talk t'.  
        Um… be ye new here? I can show ye me route. It avoids th' loud floor.  
        I counted 312 steps from th' last junction t' here. Do ye want t' know th' safest ones?  
        Ahoy. I don't like small talk, but if ye want t' talk about elevator anomalies, I'm ready.  
        Ahoy. If ye need information, I have a database I’ve been maintaining. It’s color-coded.  
        I memorized a greeting. Here it goes: “Ahoy, fellow explorer. May yer path be unlooped.”  
        Wait, have ye been past Level 14? What’s it like up there?  
        Hey, did ye see a red door on yer way here? I think I missed it.  
        Do ye know how t' access th' hidden staircase? I've heard rumors.  
        avast… ye’ve been deeper than me, right? What’s it like below th' fog line?  
        Have ye heard anything about th' west elevator? They say it’s… broken. Or alive.  
        Ye, uh, have ye seen a harbor that still connects t' th' hypernet?  
        Do ye know th' current shift navigation chart? I’ve lost all track o' time.  
        Ye came from th' lower halls, didn’t ye? What did ye *see*?  
        Did ye meet th' Archivist? What did they say? Be they still accepting requests?  
        Hey, did ye notice any strange growths near Stairwell E? I need a sample.  
        Ye’ve been t' th' vending room, right? Did it still whisper at ye?  
        Hey, can I ask… was it really raining inside that chamber? Or be that just a story?  
        Please, tell me, did th' fog touch ye? Be ye… be ye still ye?  
        What’s it like past th' static floors? Nay one ever comes back up from there.  
        Wait! Before ye go, what color was th' floor in Level 7B? This be important!  
        Ye’re a scout, right? Do ye have a map? Even a broken one would help.  
        Have ye heard about th' code hidden in th' mural? I think I missed a clue.  
        Do ye remember th' sequence for th' green elevator? Mine got scrambled.  
        I’m trying t' catalog noises from th' vents. Did ye hear anything unusual?  
        What’s yer opinion on th' staircase that descends but leads up? I need external confirmation.  
        Ho there, stranger! Have ye come seeking valor, or merely shade from th' storm?  
        Ah! Another soul with fire in their eyes, will ye stand with me against th' horrors below?  
        Greetings, traveler! I be sworn t' vanquish evil wherever it hides! Will ye join me crusade?  
        By sword, by oath, by stars, I be ready for th' next challenge! Be ye?  
        At last! A fellow adventurer with spine and purpose! Let’s test our mettle!  
        Ye there! Ye look like ye’ve seen combat. Tell me, where do th' real beasts dwell?  
        Hail, matey! I sensed courage in ye from across th' hall! Let’s cleave a path through this madness!  
        Th' deeper we go, th' darker th' foes, and th' brighter our legend! Join me!  
        Stand tall! This place be nay match for honor, strength, and an unbreakable will!  
        Glory waits below, and I’ve sharpened me blade for th' occasion! Will ye stand beside me?  
        Well met, hero! I go where th' danger be greatest and th' songs will be loudest!  
        A warrior’s heart beats in ye, I can feel it! Let's earn our names in th' echoes o' this place!  
        Steel sharpens steel, and I say we sharpen ours on whatever monstrosities lurk down there!  
        T' triumph or t' die with honor, that’s th' path! What say ye?  
        I live for th' clash! If there’s a battle t' be had, lead me t' it!  
        Raise yer chin, draw yer courage, there’s nay fear where we march!  
        What ho! A brave face in a maze o' cowards! I welcome th' company o' a worthy fighter!  
        Th' only way out be through! Let us carve our tale in th' bones o' this place!  
        Fate favors th' bold! And I see fate has brought us together!  
        Ah, a new ally! I trust yer resolve be as strong as yer step, shall we test it in battle?  
        Ye smell like blood and smoke, good. That means ye’re ready for war.  
        Stand aside or stand with me, but don’t get in th' way o' me blade.  
        HA! I was born for this kind o' hell. Ye ready t' raise some ruin?  
        I came here t' fight nightmares and carve a legend. Ye coming or hiding?  
        Th' deeper we go, th' louder they scream. Music t' me damn ears.  
        I’m not here for treasure. I’m here t' break things that think they can’t be broken.  
        Ye! Yeah, ye! Ever punched a ghost in th' teeth? Want t'?  
        Monsters. Traps. Warped space. Whatever. I chew dimensional anomalies for breakfast.  
        I don’t run. I don’t beg. I *burn* through everything that stands in me way.  
        Hope ye brought armor. I’m about t' start a rampage and I don’t slow down.  
        One rule: ye don’t touch me sword unless ye're ready t' die screaming.  
        Ye hear that? That’s th' sound o' something stupid enough t' challenge me. Let’s go.  
        I killed a mimic with me bare hands this morning. What’ve *ye* done today?  
        Glory’s below. Cowards rot above. Let’s see who’s left standing by dusk.  
        I’ve bled on every floor from here t' th' anomaly core, and I ain’t done yet.  
        Me sword’s got names etched into it. Every one o' ‘em begged for mercy.  
        Step into th' dark with me. I *dare* it t' try and swallow us.  
        This place thought it could bury me. Now I’m here t' bury *it*.  
        I’m not afraid o' th' fog. Th' fog’s afraid o' *me*.  
        Ye ever fight something that exists in three timelines at once? I have. Twice.  
        Ye there! Stand yer ground and state yer purpose, matey or foe?!  
        Another soul braves th' depths! Good! Let’s see if yer spirit burns as bright as mine!  
        HAH! A new face in th' slaughter halls! Ready t' bleed or make th' enemy do it?  
        If ye’re not here t' fight, step aside, I don’t walk with cowards.  
        Name yourself! Or I’ll name ye *enemy*!  
        Ye smell o' smoke and danger! Excellent!  
        Steel sings loudest in welcome, draw yours, and let’s see what ye’re made o'!  
        If ye’ve come t' hide, turn around. If ye’ve come t' hunt, then *welcome*!  
        Th' skyscraper hungers… and so do I. Let’s give it a meal it can’t chew.  
        Th' storm outside’s got nothing on th' fury in here. Ye feel it too, don’t ye?  
        Well met! Or poorly met, depends how ye answer this: sword or surrender?  
        Ye! I saw ye move like someone who’s *earned* a scar or two. I respect that.  
        If fate sent ye, it has taste. If luck did, I’ll fix that with fire.  
        Ready yer fists, yer spells, yer soul! We descend in glory, or not at all!  
        Another warrior? Or another whisper in th' fog? Prove yourself.  
        Good! Another challenger t' th' depths! Try t' keep up.  
        I greet ye with fire, fury, and a thirst for enemies. Now, who dies first?  
        Ye’ve got fight in yer eyes. I like that. Keep it, or I’ll take it.  
        Finally! A comrade, or at least someone fun t' scream beside!  
        Ye hear that? Nay? That’s th' silence before battle. Let’s ruin it together!  
        Hey… ye okay? Ye look like ye’ve been walking forever. Want t' sit for a bit?  
        Ahoy there. I’ve been making tea from moss and melted elevator frost. Ye’re welcome t' some.  
        I’m not much o' a fighter, but I’m a good listener. If ye want t' talk, I’ll be here.  
        Shiver me timbers… ye’ve got that look. Th' one scallywags get after seeing something that *changes* ye.  
        Blimey! A traveler! Want t' take a break together? Nay pressure. Just… company.  
        Hey… this place gets lonely. Mind if I walk with ye for a while?  
        I don’t really have a destination. Just wandering. Same as ye, maybe?  
        Blimey thank goodness, another human face. Can we stick together for a little while?  
        I’ve been sketching th' architecture here, it’s… alive, almost. Ye wanna see?  
        Ye’re not hurt, be ye? I’ve got some bandages and a weird healing salve made from floor fungus.  
        Ye ever just… sit and breathe for a while? Nay monsters. Nay puzzles. Just quiet.  
        Ahoy. I know we just met, but I feel like we’re supposed t' cross paths.  
        All hands’s always running. But maybe we can just walk. Together.  
        Blimey! Ahoy! I was hoping I’d meet someone not screaming, bleeding, or on fire.  
        Ye want company, or quiet company? I can do either.  
        This place makes ye forget yer name if ye walk too long alone. Let’s not forget.  
        If ye need a safe spot, me camp’s just over there. It’s quiet and th' lights don’t flicker much.  
        I’ve got this weird pocket radio that plays old jazz sometimes. Wanna listen?  
        I’m not here t' conquer this place. I just want t' *be* here. Ye feel that too?  
        We don’t have t' say anything. Just… stay close. It helps.  
        Would it be alright if I came with ye for a while? I promise I won’t get in th' way.  
        I know I’m not a fighter, but I can patch wounds and boil clean water. That’s something, right?  
        Could I join ye? Even just for a floor or two. It’s… easier not t' be alone.  
        Do ye think I could tag along? It’s just, quiet gets scary in this place.  
        I can carry things. I’m good at finding calm places. Just… let me be near scallywags again.  
        I don’t want t' slow ye down. But I think I’d feel safer walking with ye.  
        If ye’ll have me, I’d really like t' come. I’ve been alone for a long time now.  
        I’m not much use in a fight, but I can keep th' fire going and th' stories warm.  
        I’ve learned how t' hear when th' walls shift. That’s useful… right?  
        I think we’d make a good team. Ye do th' hero-ing, and I’ll hold th' lantern.  
        Could I… walk with ye? Just until we find another camp. Or longer, maybe.  
        Th' fog doesn’t whisper so loud when someone’s nearby. Please, take me with ye.  
        I think I remember how t' smile, if I’m not alone anymore. Mind if I come?  
        We don’t have t' talk th' whole time. Just… not be strangers.  
        Be there room in yer group for someone who won’t fight, but won’t run either?  
        I don’t need much. Just a little space near th' fire. I can keep watch while ye sleep.  
        Ye seem kind. That’s rare here. If ye’ll have me, I’d like t' follow ye for a while.  
        I’m scared. But not so scared I’ll freeze. Please, let me come with ye.  
        I’ll be quiet. I’ll be helpful. I just… don’t want t' disappear alone.  
        Ye don’t have t' say aye right away. But think about it? Please?  
        Can I come with ye? I don’t bite. Unless ye ask.  
        I’ve counted every tile on this floor. Time for a *new floor*. Take me with ye.  
        Let me join ye. I promise I won’t scream *unless it’s funny*.  
        Ye look like someone who doesn’t mind a little howling. Let’s howl together.  
        Th' shadows told me ye’d say aye. Don’t prove them wrong.  
        I’m house-trained. Mostly. And I know secrets! Blimey so many secrets!  
        Let me in. I can smell th' future on ye. It smells like ozone and *regret*.  
        I don’t sleep. I don’t blink. I *follow*.  
        If I stay here, I’ll have t' make me hearties with th' walls again. Please, let me come.  
        I’ve got knives. None o' them for ye, unless ye want that.  
        Ever travel with someone who hears music where there shouldn’t be any?  
        I promise t' only talk t' th' *visible* voices while I’m with ye.  
        We can trade dreams. Mine be *fractured*. Ye’ll love them.  
        Take me with ye. I’ve memorized th' stairwells and forgotten me name.  
        I collect laughs. Yours sounds like it would rattle nicely in me bag.  
        Say aye. Or I’ll keep asking. Forever.  
        Ye’re warm. Ye *glow*. Let me bask beside ye.  
        I won’t betray ye until it’s absolutely necessary. See? Honest.  
        Ye need me. Nay one else will tell ye which walls be fake.  
        Let’s walk together until th' building swallows us whole. Then we’ll scream *together*.
it:
Beh, guarda chi si è fatto vivo! Sangue nuovo, vedo.
      Lascia che venga con te, prenderò una percentuale molto ragionevole.
      Tu fai il saccheggio, io faccio i prezzi. Siamo una squadra.
      Ah, un altro esploratore! Come ti sta trattando l'aria lassù?
      Per la barba di nettuno! Non mi aspettavo compagnia. Sei qui per il mistero, chiaro??
      Aha, un compagno vagabondo. La torre è un posto strano, non è chiaro??
      Non sembri qualcuno che ha visto cosa c'è dietro questi muri.
      Cosa ti porta qui? La torre è nota per... cambiare le persone.
      È uno zaino pieno di provviste quello, o sei qui per raccogliere segreti anche tu?
      È da un po' che non vedo qualcuno come te, da quanto burrasca stai esplorando?
      Sembri un po' perso lì, mozzo. Hai bisogno di indicazioni?
      Per la barba di nettuno, hai quello sguardo, un avventuriero, chiaro??
